name: cloud.dchub/mcp-server
description: Live data center intelligence for AI agents: 21,000+ facilities, 51 grid regions (10 ISOs + 43 utility balancing authorities), the daily DCPI power index (232 markets) + DCGI gas index (47 states), gas pipelines, fiber routes, interconnection queues, water risk, tax incentives, and $324B+ in M&A.
